Crew Packs - LIVE

Crew Packs are officially LIVE!

Purchase and open your packs of Star Atlas characters now!  

Silver Pack of 5
Gold Pack of 5
Platinum Pack of 5

Silver Pack of 1 (At 20% premium)
Gold Pack of 1 (At 20% premium)
Platinum Pack of 1 (At 20% Premium)

Important note: We're aware of a bug causing legacy crew members (from before Crew Packs, like Anna Tolle) to receive new art when re-rolled. We're working on a fix, and if you've already re-rolled, we'll make sure to correct it.

 | Open your packs here: https://play.staratlas.com/crew/
